name: Absolute Volleyball Academy
description:
Come Join us Friday and Saturday at AVA for some fun Indoor Pickleball Play!

Friday, July 26th from: 6pm to 9pm

Saturday, July 27th from: 5pm to 8

Come join us for some Friday & Saturday evening indoor pickleball at AVA!

Where:  Absolute Volleyball Academy of Texas

Location:  380 Green Wing Street, Webster, TX 77598

Cost: $10 Venmo or Cash (Register at the door)

Courts: 6 indoor courts! Great spacing - awesome air-condition!

Music mix from the 70's to 90's

We are now selling beer and wine if you need a quick refresh before, after, or during play.

Come join us this weekend! 

Bring a friend or just yourself!
fees: Fee required — $10 cash or venmo for 3 hours of continuous play

name: Casa Pickle
description: Houston’s premier indoor pickleball destination. Casa offers climate-controlled courts with cushioned, sound-dampened surfaces, perfect for year-round play. Players enjoy world-class coaching, DUPR nights, leagues, and open play sessions. Off the court, relax at the Vista Lounge bar or connect with a vibrant pickleball community. Whether you’re a beginner or competitive player, Casa Pickle is where Houston comes to play, train, and socialize.
open_play_schedule: Casa Pickle offers a full schedule designed for every type of player. Open play is available in rotating intervals throughout the day, with lessons and clinics offered regularly alongside leagues and special events. Weekly highlights include DUPR Nights, Golden Hour Open Play with food trucks, and our Smash & Sweat fitness sessions. For the most up-to-date schedule and to reserve your spot, find us on CourtReserve.
fees: Fee required — Casa Pickle welcomes both members and visitors. Memberships are available for players who want unlimited access, priority booking, and exclusive perks like leagues, clinics, and member-

name: Russ Poppe Family Park
description: Hey fellow pickleball enthusiasts! We've implemented a new, simple paddle stacking system at our local courts to help everyone find the perfect game. We now have two separate queues: one for Social Play and another for Competitive Play. The system has been a huge success, making it easier for players of all skill levels to enjoy a great match. If you're looking for a fun, relaxed game or a more challenging, fast-paced one, come check us out! We're growing our community and would love to see more players join the fun and help us keep the courts lively.

name: The Pickleball Spot
description:
Now open! 

We have three indoor pickleball courts (acrylic painted concrete) and two large skills training areas. Come for open play everyday or reserve a court.

Open play the best way: long lines and wait times take the steam out of your game.  We limit our open play so everyone can get enough playtime.

We offer limited memberships and they will sell out fast.

Beginner classes weekly for only $10 per player.

Very relaxed, fun and as competitive as you want it to be!
open_play_schedule: There will be open play daily and ability to reserve courts daily.
